PROP-baseauction-inv-092.text: Price scaling in getAssetPrice must match scaling direction used in transmit.
PROP-baseauction-inv-092.assertion: getAssetPrice dataFeed scaling uses same formula as transmit: dec<18 => multiply, >18 => divide

locations.note: lines 396-400: data feed scaling: dec<18 multiply, dec>18 divide — mirrors transmit logic at lines 168-172
lines 167-172: streams scaling formula to compare against _getAssetPrice data feed scaling
